holdings.infoBox: ACWX is an equity ETF with a total of 1916 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 4.91%, Samsung Electronics at 2.81%, SK hynix at 2.62%, ASML Holding at 1.90%, and Tencent Holdings at 0.88%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI ACWI ex U.S. ETF (ACWX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI AC World ex USA index. The fund tracks the performance of a market-cap-weighted index of international stocks. It captures 85% of the publicly available market, thus excluding small-caps. ACWX was launched on Mar 26, 2008 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Tactical Rules Give a Flashing Yellow Light
data.text: SUMMARY The Fed is on hold as inflation concerns continue. The US Trend remains positive and has regained short-term momentum.

data.title: International Stocks Are Outperforming. Investment Pros Weigh the ‘Sell America' Trade.
data.text: Investment advisors agree that it would be foolish for clients not to own foreign shares. The question is what to buy now and how much.

data.title: ETFs are on pace to take in a record $1.3 trillion in 2025. Here's where the money's going.
data.text: Investors keep piling into exchange-traded funds — with the latest monthly flow data reflecting some limit to their appetite for risk in the U.S., as well as a desire to diversify internationally.

data.text: French stocks have taken a beating on election worries, dragging down popular equity indexes focused on countries outside the U.S.

data.title: International stocks outperform, decouple from U.S. equities by ‘unusual degree'
data.text: International stocks are broadly outperforming this quarter, decoupling from the U.S. to an unusual extent, according to DataTrek Research.

data.text: Stocks in Europe and emerging markets are cheap compared to those in the U.S., but that's not the only draw.

data.title: Tech stocks bounce back as Dow rises 200 points
data.text: Brenda Vingiello, Sand Hill Global Advisors CIO, joins the 'Fast Time Halftime Report' to discuss tech stocks catching up and if they think it's sustainable.
